title: XPRIZE SHINE - Paper-based SARS-CoV-2 Saliva Test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2dbjc","text":"This protocol describes how to perform a SHINE paper-based assay to detect SARS-CoV-2 RNA from a self-collected saliva sample. This protocol is intended for in-home use. All enzymatic components are provided as a single-test freeze-dried pellet for shelf-stable storage, and all steps of the protocol are performed at ambient temperature. The protocol presented here is an improved version of the method presented in Arizti-Sanz J*, Freije CA*, et al. Integrated sample inactivation, amplification, and Cas13-based detection of SARS-CoV-2. bioRxiv (2020). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":445,"length":7},{"style":"italic","offset":540,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"650sf","text":"Download the HandLens application on the user-provided smart device (smartphone, tablet, etc.). Wash hands prior to starting the protocol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"22m5f","text":"Please take care with potentially infectious sample material that does not come into contact with the provided viral lysis solution contained within the saliva sample collection tube. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

All enzymatic components, reagents, and compatible buffers required for SARS-CoV-2 detection are included within Lyophilized Reagent Mix B and are reconstituted with Reagent Mix A (see protocol for details). A smartphone or smart device is necessary for automated interpretation of the SARS-CoV-2 detection results using the HandLens application. The required volume of Reagent Mix A is provided in the Nalgene Dropper steps: Expel approximately one drop of saliva into the sample collection tube and cap the tube. Saliva collection tube contains necessary volume of FastAmp® Viral and Cell Solution. FastAmp® Viral and Cell Solution for Covid-19 Testing Solution B Contributed by users Catalog #4633 Screw cap tube 5 mL sterile Thomas Scientific Catalog #1188R46
Mix saliva sample and FastAmp® Viral and Cell Solution by shaking the closed sample collection tube for 00:00:10
Wait 00:05:00 incubating sample at Room temperature before proceeding to Step 4.

Add the entire volume in the dropper bottle containing Reagent Mix A to the tube containing lyophilized Reagent Mix B. Cap the tube. Nalgene™ Dropper Bottles, 15mL, white Thermo Fisher Catalog #2751-9050 Reagent Mix A (Paper-based SARS-CoV-2 resuspension mix) Contributed by users Lyophilized Reagent Mix B (Paper-based SARS-CoV-2 detection mix) Contributed by users
Mix Reagent Mix A and B by shaking for approximately 00:00:10 .

Dip the inoculation loop into the sample collection tube (a small layer of liquid should be contained within the loop). Inoculating Loops and Needles Sterile 10 uL VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #12000-810
Transfer liquid in inoculation loop to the Reagent Mix A and B tube by dipping the loop into tube and stirring for 00:00:05 .. Remove and discard the inoculation loop and cap the tube.
Mix the sample combined with Reagent Mix A and B by shaking for approximately 00:00:10 .
Wait 01:30:00 , incubating sample at Room temperature , before proceeding to Step 10.

Open the Sample-Reagent Mix A and B tube and place the test strip into the liquid with the arrows on the test strip pointing upward and towards you. HybriDetect — Universal Lateral Flow Assay Kit Contributed by users Catalog #MGHD 1
Wait 00:05:00 with sample at Room temperature for visible horizontal bands to appear on the test strip.
With the user-provided smart device such as a smartphone, open the HandLens application and select paper-based as the test type.
Take a photo of the test strip, and select upload. The result of the test will appear on the smart device screen.
creator: Catherine Freije
